programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: When twentysomething Patricia Richmond is found tied up, and murdered in her future in-laws' home, the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colorado is at a loss. Who would have taken this bride-to-be's life in such a brutal way?

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After locals smell what can only be the scent of charred meat, police find burnt remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. Before they can investigate who committed the crime, first they must identity the body.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: Philadelphia restaurant manager John Thurberg is murdered at work five months before his wedding. The motive is unclear until police begin to question restaurant employees and uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her bathtub and it is assumed she died of natural causes. But, an autopsy reveals she was strangled - who murdered her?

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: When a hardworking mum is shot dead on a sidewalk in 2005, police worked tirelessly to catch the killer. With a murderer on the loose, it was a race against time.

programme.title: Homicide City
programme.desc: When a DJ is found brutally murdered outside a radio station, police originally believe it was a robbery gone wrong. The truth reveals he was not just a random victim.

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.sub-title: I Deserve to Live, They Don't
programme.desc: Millionaire CEO Kim Bailey suspects her employees are stealing from her. When a colleague vanishes, an FBI investigation leads to a deadly conclusion.

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.sub-title: I Deserve to Live, They Don't
programme.desc: Millionaire CEO Kim Bailey suspects her employees are stealing from her. When a colleague vanishes, an FBI investigation leads to a deadly conclusion.

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: A respected police Lieutenant, Billy Fields, fails to solve the murder of a young mother. Years later, the reason why becomes shockingly clear.

programme.title: American Monster: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Schirmer wields power over his congregants, and when one takes their own life, investigators question the accidents that killed this minister's two wives, revealing a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.sub-title: Roses Are Red, Murder Is Too
programme.desc: When a town council member is found murdered, local residents are appalled, especially when the evidence begins to suggest a professional `hit'.

programme.title: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: When shy single mum Amy Theriault falls for handsome Jesse Marquis, it seems a good match. But, what starts out as a fairytale romance ends in unthinkable violence.

programme.title: Seduced to Slay
programme.desc: A burned-out car with a body in the trunk and a hidden torture chamber rock the town of Speedway, Indiana. When a similar murder happens in Texas, detectives fear their suspects have crossed state lines and will strike again if they're not stopped.

programme.title: Fatal Affairs
programme.desc: When a new girl arrives in town, it causes heads to turn, including that of the local heartthrob. However, he is married, and waist-deep in the town's drug problem. When they embark on an affair, it leads to mayhem and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: A young woman thinks she's found true love, but her ideal man turns out to have the heart of a monster. Meanwhile, a video game junkie is locked in a lonely world until the perfect partner leads him to the darkest place of all.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: A man has high hopes for his daughter's future, but his plans will end in terror. A man's love for his daughter has its limits when sinister forces are at work.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: A shooting in a luxury high-rise building sends shockwaves through the upscale neighbourhood of Uptown. Starting with surveillance video from the crime scene, detectives soon uncover a list of suspects and a plot born out of economic envy.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: Workouts turn a group of fitness fanatics into bitter rivals. As the competition heats up, it's not just buff bodies and tight abs on the line.

programme.title: The Lies That Bind
programme.desc: When a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church, Paula Allen lost her life. Upon investigation, a fire marshal discovers that this fire was no accident.

programme.title: Emergency Nurses: A+E Stories
programme.desc: Nurses Becca and Charlotte help a patient through two ankle manipulations after falling off a horse before joining the other nurses to get 'plastered'...

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Rylan faces the grilling of a lifetime from a cast of autistic and learning-disabled interviewers. Has he ever considered a real suntan? Is honesty always the best policy? From cancelled celebrity friends to the contents of his bedside table, nothing is off limits. As the questions come thick and fast, Rylan opens up about infidelity, heartbreak, estrangement from his father and the breakdown that forced him to take life day by day.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: A daily delivery of bespoke Mindfulness content designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Alison meets a bunch of excitable Staffy cross pups who desperately need to learn some manners. She also helps a Husky Shepherd cross get over his separation anxiety, and meets a beautiful Tibetan Terrier who has a serious issue with his back leg.

programme.desc: Britain's weekday breakfast show on the latest news, weather and sports as well as offering information on entertainment, health and money.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live LIVE
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live coverage of the Oaks from Epsom. The Fillies' classic is the third classic of the season and is one of the most important races of the flat season - Aidan O'Brien has an incredible record in the race and Amelia Earhart looks to have a favourite's chance to add another race to her CV.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Frank from Middlesex, Maya from Bolton, Lee from Birmingham and Suzy from Chesterfield come together as a team to try to take down one of the country's finest quiz brains.

programme.desc: The latest news in London and the South East, plus local weather.

programme.title: UEFA Women's European Qualifiers LIVE
programme.desc: The Lionesses continue their World Cup qualifying campaign with a key match against their old rivals Spain. The two teams played in April and England executed the perfect game plan, winning 1-0 with a Lauren Hemp goal. Seema Jaswal presents coverage of the match at the Mallorca Son Moix Stadium in Mallorca. Karen Carney and Anita Asante provide the expert analysis. Seb Hutchinson and Siobhan Chamberlain are on commentary.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: After an emotional farewell to their home and family in the UK, Becky and the kids make the big move to Italy, taking everything with them - including their dogs and grand piano. But Italian life is immediately complicated, with a frustrated Jamie injured and unable to play but desperate to start scoring goals for his new club.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: Despite Jamie's best efforts on the pitch, his new Italian side are struggling to get a win and stay out of the relegation zone. Things go from bad to worse when the Vardys' lakeside villa is dramatically burgled, leaving the whole family on edge and considering whether to return home. Becky and the kids escape to the mountains for a much-needed change of scenery and time to think clearly about their situation.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britain's best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the world's longest running prime-time drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet a mum and son restoring an historic windmill and Sandy and Andy, who plan to open a glamping site on their farm.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Brighton, the boys meet recycler Cat, who has tonnes of junk in sea containers. Henry salvages a kid's scooter, while Simon constructs the largest corkscrew that valuer Ronnie has ever seen.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first to host are husband-and-wife team Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire, the only couple in this week's competition. As the hosts show their three female guests to their rooms, Caroline, owner of The Dean Bed & Breakfast, gives a frosty response to the fact that they don't live on site, while Sue from Seashells Guesthouse is left in hysterics.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group are off to Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue's dog friendly Seashells Guesthouse. After revealing that she allows dogs to sleep in the beds during the last B&B visit, no one knows quite what to expect. As soon as they pull up, all the guests are blown away by the doggy-themed exterior. The interior is equally memorable, with Paul and Flora finding themselves in the Cappuccino Room and Caroline in the Poppy Room.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In Bath, forthright American ex-banker Nancy Hampson isn't everybody's favourite person. There's trouble from the off for her at The Old Court Guesthouse.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests head to Scotland to stay with final host Caroline at The Dean Bed and Breakfast. The picturesque house, its two acres of gardens and breath-taking views across the Firth of Forth immediately win everyone over. However, rogue underwear in the drawers and cobwebs on the curtains are touches that the guests aren't so keen on.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: There are tensions, tempers and tears as the group reconvene for one last time to thrash out the feedback, reveal the payments and announce the winner in the competition to be named best value B&B of the week. Paul and Flora from Silverwood Lodge are fired up about Nancy's comments and a tussle over TVs and hot water leads to accusations of lying and game playing.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 49-year-old performing arts teacher Helen is getting the party started. Flamboyant Helen's cooking doesn't exactly go to plan but her dinner party is all about the entertainment and she certainly delivers on that.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the second day of the competition in Sheffield and the turn of design and technology teacher Claire to impress the guests with her Asian inspired menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day three in Sheffield and the turn of service administrator Monika to host. She's hoping to win the prize by treating her guests to a traditional Bulgarian night, inspired by her homeland.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day four in Sheffield and 80s musician Ivor's turn to host. After tensions rose between Claire and Helen at Bulgarian Monika's night, Ivor's determined to put some fun into his evening with a live performance from his own band.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final day in Sheffield and the turn of former chef Simon. He's confident that his meal will be head and shoulders above the competition, but after all the criticism he's dished out this week, he's not going to get an easy ride.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Wharfe House in Wetherby, run by B&B newcomer Pauline Cox, who is joined by best friend Claire Smith.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk where husband and wife team Jenny and Clive Aylett strive to be perfect.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit this week is to Bath Lodge Castle in Somerset where hosts Karen and Mike Hepker run a luxury castle experience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, where publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne like to mix business with pleasure.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the last day of the competition and the owners of Wharfe House, Wortwell Hall Barn, Bath Castle Lodge and The Old Lodge Hotel meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie searches north east London for ballet dancer Nicol and his brother Harry. They're joining together to get on the property ladder. But even pooling their funds won't get them into Hackney or Hoxton, so it's off to Walthamstow and Leyton.

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts heat six, as five more players prove they know their Boyzone from their Britney. Who will come out at the top and secure their place in the Grand Final?

programme.desc: Steve is rushed in after hitting his head on concrete. Fleur has a pain in her leg, while Muffy, who may have had a stroke, recalls her years as an air hostess with Pan Am.

Now the original girls - hence, the `OG' in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nannny's magic license is out of date and in order to get a new one she must pass a test, set by the Wise Old Elf.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly meet a new friend, Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad that she can't join in their games because she can't fly.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy and her dad are having a relaxing day boating on the lake. They fish out an old glittery mirror from the bottom of the lake, but it belongs to a mermaid who would like it back.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit gives Mummy Pig, Peppa and George a ride in her rescue helicopter. Daddy Pig is very sad to escape all the fun - but Miss Rabbit makes sure that doesn't happen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story to help them fall asleep. When George wakes up again, Peppa has to make up a bedtime story to get him back to sleep.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's playgroup are really enjoying Grampy Rabbit's talk about space rockets, until suddenly he loses his voice. Can Doctor Brown Bear get him speaking again?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has come to play with Peppa, and has made up a pretend friend called `Leo Lion'. Peppa can't see Leo, but Suzy announces that Leo likes roaring and playing dressing up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is George's first day at Peppa's playgroup. He paints a very good picture and everyone thinks he's brilliant, including Peppa.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's bedtime, but Peppa is not sleepy, so Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George a story about a pretty princess and a dinosaur.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are driving in their large campervan across America to get to Hollywood. They stop at a diner to ask for directions and meet another Miss Rabbit. She sings them some songs and cooks them some eggs, over easy, of course, then they go to a barn dance followed closely by watching a Monster Truck rally, expect lots of muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, her friends, and their parents, learn woodworking from Mister Wolf. He asks Daddy Pig to make a hut out of twigs, but it isn't very strong and Mister Wolf manages to blow it down.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You!
programme.sub-title: Josh and Blue's Ice Cream Shoppe
programme.desc: Josh and Blue are serving up ice cream on a hot, summer day, but there's just one problem: everyone is gone; while playing Blue's Clues to figure it out, viewers help Jingles the ice cream truck and even learn how to make ice cream.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Vanessa the dragon is looking forward to some personal time to fix up the lighthouse, but her neighbours are also in need of her assistance. Soon, she's tiring herself out trying to make pancakes while washing a kennel and running an aerobics class.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Keys has promised a new song to Radio Wyndley but hasn't left herself much time to write it. She's low on ideas, and she visits her neighbours for inspiration. Duster dog, Isabella the bear and little poet Caylee provide her with too many ideas.

programme.title: Circle Square
programme.desc: Fog moves in while the neighbours are enjoying a boat trip. Vanessa the dragon rushes back to switch on her lighthouse but it fails to shine. She enlists Duster the dog to find a new way to guide her friends home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is determined that George's new hat doesn't get muddy when Peppa and George visit Grandpa and Granny Pig. Everyone tries to make sure that it stays clean - even if it means that they get messy instead!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and the gang sail on a canal boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George explore the greenhouse, and it is full of lovely tomatoes and basil. When it's time for dinner, Granny Pig takes all the ingredients they have grown and makes a tasty salad.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but when he keeps getting stuck in the mud, they all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy's dad is digging up the meadow and the Little Kingdom is in danger. How can they stop him without being discovered?

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away on important business, but ruling the Little Kingdom isn't as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Daisy and Poppy's Trip to the Museum
programme.desc: The naughty toddlers cause chaos during a trip to the big museum.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly goes to school for the first time, to learn something other than how to make magic jelly. Ben comes along, despite protests from the Wise Old Elf. Everybody learns a lesson.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Super Gabby and Super Pandy shrink down to save the day from CatRat and solve his playful puzzles.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington Finds a Pigeon; Paddington and the Chores List
programme.desc: Paddington nurses an injured bird back to health and discovers a new friend in Pigeonton. Mr. Brown creates a list of chores for Paddington, who accidentally picks up the wrong list.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig are taking Peppa and George to a festival - a jigsaw festival! Peppa is amazed by all of the completed jigsaws around the festival.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is looking forward to taking Peppa and George to visit a fish pond that he used to visit when he was a piglet. However, a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts! What can they be?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to the playground.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephant's birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than they'd thought.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's playschool.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle wants bread for his Royal breakfast, but there isn't any flour in the castle. Mr Elf takes everyone to the Elf Windmill to find out why it takes so long to make flour.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Meet fairy princess Holly and her elf best friend Ben.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After the disappearance of Mrs Fotheringill, Mrs Elf becomes the twins' new teacher.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Snobby King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit the Little Kingdom, and Holly and her Mummy and Daddy enlist the Elf Band to impress them.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington and the Balloons; Paddington Meets a Police Officer
programme.desc: Paddington must solve a crime when he goes on patrol as an unofficial policeman. Jonathan has lost his balloon and Paddington tries to get him a new one.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You!
programme.desc: Rainbow Puppy is filming a music video in Mexico City and she needs us to join her! But when Tour Bus breaks down, how will we get there in time? We'll play Blue's Clues as we dance, learn new Spanish words, and explore Mexico City!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family team up with Danny Dog to swing across the monkey trees.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The adventures of Peppa Pig and friends continue with more fun and games.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly breaks her wand and must go to the Wand Factory, at the bottom of the Great Elf Tree, to get it fixed.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George have come to play at Granny and Grandpa's house. Everyone dresses as dinosaurs having lots of fun and a bit of a party.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa Pig and Suzy Sheep are spending the day with Doctor Hamster, and they are learning about what vets do. Doctor Hamster says she's glad to have two helpers with her and calls the next patient.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging while taking them on a tour of her underground house.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited. That can only mean one thing - soft play! George and friends have great fun, swinging, bouncing and climbing, but it isn't quite as much fun for the grown-ups!

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that `The Chipmunks' have become too obsessed with a new video game. When they challenge Dave to play, Dave becomes even more addicted than `The Chipmunks.'

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the limited edition skateboard he's always wanted but Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. Soon, Alvin is stuck in the cage and the real animal goes home!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Growth Spout; Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to find enough food to feed Pearl as she goes through her `Growth Spout', and then in `Stuck in the Wringer', after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy; The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself to get the Krabby Patty formula in `Someone's in the Kitchen with Sandy', and then in `The Inside Job', Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the secret recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: In `Greasy Buffoons', Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. Then in `Model Sponge', SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: Playing Dead; Beef in the Mess Hall
programme.desc: A visiting tortoise gets in an accident, and Elliot is forced into the most awkward of charades. Elliot accepts the challenge of a fight with Sugar, the white tiger.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: Boog accepts a dangerous fishing challenge and discovers he is terrible at it. Elliot comes across a creature he believes to be a sign of good luck.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves; Alvin befriends a new student, but Theodore learns something surprising about him.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: While Nine reassembles the Paradox Prism, Shadow and Sonic battle the Council to buy more time - but there's one big surprise they weren't counting on.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: With the Paradox Prism in his hands, Nine begins building the Grim into his own personal paradise, unless Sonic and Shadow can convince him otherwise.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking teddy bear drives Alvin and Simon crazy. Alvin is not thrilled about going back to school, until he sees the new principal.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. Theodore posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a big hit.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and corr.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.sub-title: The Boba-Get; Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favourite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the café using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their mums and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph's love for fighting puts him at odds with his brothers as they try and stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Sonic must learn to give up some control if he's going to defeat Nine on the battlefield; the first step is letting the team take over.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: To beat the biggest bot on the battlefield and get one step closer to Nine, Sonic needs to move fast and accept a little help from his friends.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin believes a neighbour is responsible for a recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to a big soccer game.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Camp Wild; A Break From the Norm
programme.desc: Elliot and Boog stumble upon an abandoned human summer camp, but their plans on keeping it a secret are put on hold when they meet Kiki. The campers must choose between their prejudices or their better nature.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: The Wisdom of the Naked Mole Rats; Doommates
programme.desc: The Campers think they're wild, until they meet a surprising group of naked mole rats that are even wilder than they are. Boog and Elliot's friendship hits the rocks over sharing a cabin.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.sub-title: The Three Ravens; Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie and the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers, but when Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him; eager to become master criminals, Lil and Jack help Chuck with his dirty laundry, but are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.sub-title: The Secret of Lake Island; Father, Son, and Furniture Store
programme.desc: Lil intros Jack to a deserted theme park: Lake Island; when they're stranded, their new friendship quickly crumbles; Will tries to connect with Jack at the oddball store Mike A's; everything goes awry and they must fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacleboy let SpongeBob and Patrick in on their secret heroic origins in `Mermaidman Begins', and in `Plankton's Good Eye', Plankton uses SpongeBob's DNA to grow himself a second eye.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Little Yellow Book; Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward reads SpongeBob's diary aloud at the Krusty Krab and SpongeBob fails his driving test.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.sub-title: The Devil Is in the Tails
programme.desc: Sonic discovers a new ability that may be the key to defeating Nine; however, Nine's endless army has only one purpose, to capture Sonic's energy.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Reality will cease to exist unless a selfless hero makes the ultimate sacrifice; however, it may not be enough to reverse the damage Nine caused to the universe.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily introduces Jack to her favourite video game, but when he keeps losing, Jack binges the game and turns into a toxic troll; slice of life vignettes that illustrate the modern-day family dynamic.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.sub-title: The Meatball of Canyon Valley; Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge; Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: The arrival of a retired police dog, Gunner, at camp coincides with accusations of theft from the Pet Palace. Dinkelman goes missing, and Norm tries to get him back to Boog without appearing to be a Dinkelman-napper.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: The Wild Ways of Wild the Wolf; More Bang for Your Bucks

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: To Serve and Protect; Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he is elected as the school's safety monitor. Dave brings the Chipmunks on a technology-free camping trip.

programme.sub-title: My Sister the Weirdo; Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette seeks Alvin's advice when she wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party. Alvin decides to borrow Brittany's babysitting job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.sub-title: Krabby Patty Creature Feature; Teacher's Pests

programme.desc: A woman (Jane Greer) consults a lawyer (Robert Webber) about her husband (Kent Smith), whom she believes is a murderer.

programme.desc: A husband (Paul Douglas) arranges for a young man (Robert Morse) to kill his wife's latest beau in a duel.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Arguably the first supergroup, Cream featuring Ginger Baker, Jack Bruce, Eric Clapton, lyricist Pete Brown, artist and lyricist Martin Sharp, producer Felix Pappalardi and legendary engineer Tom Dowd, achieved massive worldwide success and ensured their place in rock's hall of fame with `Disraeli Gears' in 1967. With interviews musical demonstration, acoustic performance and archive footage.

programme.title: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Captured by Japanese forces during World War II, a British SAS officer and his fellow prisoners are forced to fight in brutal death matches for the entertainment of their captors.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America. He and his team soon discover that her disappearance is part of a corrupt private operation that hits way too close to home.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: XXX 2: The Next Level
programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nation's capital.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, it's not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Man's role in his father's death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: The Armour of God
programme.desc: A martial-arts expert travels the globe to collect the scattered pieces of a medieval suit of armour.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Roofman
programme.desc: Escaped convict Jeffrey Manchester hides out in a Toys "R" Us, surviving undetected for months while planning his next move. However, his double life starts to unravel when he falls for a divorced mum, setting off a compelling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows Spinal Tap as they prepare for a reunion concert. Joined by Paul McCartney and Elton John, they wrestle with their chequered past to put on a show that they hope will solidify their place in rock 'n' roll history.

programme.title: Sacramento
programme.desc: Rickey, an energetic and free-spirited young man with a Peter Pan complex, convinces his long-time friend Glenn to hit pause on his blissful domestic life and embark on an impromptu road trip across California.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that she's never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Two high-school nerds accidentally create the woman of their dreams when an electrical storm zaps their home computer.

programme.title: Multiplicity
programme.desc: For over-worked construction executive Doug, there aren't enough hours in the day. When geneticist Owen offers to clone him, Doug leaps at the chance, but is one copy enough, and how do you keep tabs on all the versions?

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Ron Burgundy tries to stay classy when he and his team take New York and the nation's first 24-hour global cable news network by storm.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics' and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning music act Milli Vanilli become the first act to have their prize stripped from them after they are exposed as a fake enterprise with the singers lip-syncing to pre-recorded tracks.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: Harry has been partying for 48 hours when he meets Johannes on the dance floor of a club in Berlin. With 15 hours until his flight home, Johannes offers to help him print his boarding pass.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious teen incurs the wrath of a beloved clergyman by challenging the town's ban on loud music and dancing.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singleton's portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: When a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal, Morgan Grant and her daughter, Clara, explore what's left behind as they confront family secrets, redefine love, and rediscover each other.

programme.title: Catch Me if You Can
programme.desc: Based on a true crime story about teenage con man Frank Abagnale Jr, who cashed fake cheques worth over $2.5 million while disguised as a pilot, a doctor and a lawyer, and the FBI agent who caught him.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Faced with a tight budget, a baseball manager and his partner recruit bargain bin players that scouts have labelled as flawed, but have game-winning potential.

programme.desc: A rebellious teen incurs the wrath of a beloved clergyman by challenging the town's ban on loud music and dancing.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world they've ever known.

programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.desc: The turtles spring into action to battle Shredder, mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and the notorious Krang.

programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wife's infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: they've all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains

programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. They're led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Frank's ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.desc: Clark Griswold sets out to give his family a traditional Christmas. While his in-laws, among them a cousin from hell, sample his hospitality, they find themselves battling against rabid squirrels, and an exploding sewer to achieve a family Christmas that they will never forget.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress', life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Aeon lives in a world restricted to the last city on Earth, after a plague has destroyed the rest of the world. The city is ruled by a council and its chairman, and people are mysteriously disappearing. Aeon is an assassin for an underground group of rebels called the Monicans, and is assigned to remove the Chairman, but at the last minute she finds herself unable to do it.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: It Feeds
programme.desc: A clairvoyant therapist confronts her own personal demons while trying to save a young girl who believes a malevolent entity is feeding on her.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A new bride is left under the care of friends when her husband travels to Transylvania for a meeting with Count Orlok. Plagued by horrific visions and an increasing sense of dread, she soon encounters an evil force that's far beyond her control.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick
programme.desc: Outlaw Riddick, on the request of the peacemakers, lands on planet New Mecca and comes face to face with the army of Necromongers who are threatening all planets in their path. Their leader, Lord Marshal, wishes to convert all humans to his beliefs, or kill them.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: Columbus and Tallahassee have orchestrated a way to survive a world overrun by zombies. With only fear keeping the `big wuss' Columbus alive, Tallahassee wants to eradicate the `last Twinkie on Earth'. The duo join forces with Wichita and Little Rock who have a style and tact of their own when it comes to dealing with the flesh-eating chaos.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: A young photographer uncovers a dark secret when he meets his girlfriend's seemingly friendly parents for the first time at their posh estate.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of London's East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielberg's 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Outlaws
programme.desc: Delve into the criminal underworld with a look at lawbreakers in film; from portrayals of ruthless crime bosses to true stories of thieves at large and smugglers on the run.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organised crime forever.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. Although completely without identity or background, he possesses an array of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistics and self-defence that speak of a dangerous past.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Life never becomes easy for ex-CIA agent Jason Bourne, who is forced out of hiding, and must return to Europe to find out exactly what happened in his past. It's not easy, as he's being framed for murder and his old employers are leading the manhunt.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne continues his quest to fill in memory gaps. When a `Guardian' reporter stumbles onto his trail, Bourne spies his chance to blow the Blackbriar black-ops brigade wide open. With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: Enhanced CIA assassin Aaron Cross faces a battle to survive when his CIA employers decide to do away with his programme.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Living off the grid for 10 years, former CIA operative Jason Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilises terror and technology to maintain unchecked power.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Based on three hybridising narrative strands, three groups of villains are intent on retrieving a missing diamond. Turkish and Tommy team up with a pugilistic Irish gypsy named Mickey for the purpose of rigging unlicensed boxing matches. However, their opponent also arranges some dodgy betting with the courier of the stolen diamond, who subsequently goes missing. To complicate further, a New York gangster arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Seven
programme.desc: Two detectives are in search of a serial killer who seems to be exacting retribution for the seven deadly sins. In his final week on the force, veteran Detective William Somerset is drawn back into the decay of the city as he and Detective David Mills, his cocky replacement, hunt the maniac.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who will stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.desc: Massive elephant seals go nose to nose to win the title of beachmaster, and giant petrels earn the nickname, murderous garbage men. Meanwhile, a female humpback goes to extremes to protect her calf from amorous males.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Canada, where summer is short and time is tight, any time is the right time to fight. The mighty North provides the setting for bison, bald eagles, and polar bears to wage some of the most heavy-duty fighting in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: From the Amazon to the Andes, South America has some beautiful scenery. From guanacos sparring over grassland, to marine iguanas head-butting over a beachhead, to home-stealing hermit crabs, the quest for real estate causes a lot of conflict.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: With real-life duelling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef's main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Feel the heat of summer's arrival as supersize sea snails try to fend off an invading gang of coral-hungry starfish. Accompany reef sharks as they prowl for a midnight meal and marvel at the slippery disguise a parrotfish uses to survive the night.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Jess and Dan catch a keelback snake before it spreads its foul smell. It's a battle of wills as Mick and Adele tackle a python in a drain. And Stu discovers a dangerous snake hiding in the wall of a university.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Mick and Adele remove two mating eastern brown snakes from a nursing home. Stu and Liv catch a tree snake in the warehouse, while Jess and Dan track down a dangerous intruder.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Ancient Enemies: In Africa, lions and wolves lead their ecosystems. Discover the strength, social strategies and hierarchies behind how they raise and protect their young.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a constant fight for survival.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Across the planet, wolves and lions lead two legendary predator lineages: canids and felines. We explore their differences and similarities, from brute strength to social intelligence, revealing who dominates in each territory.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough's journey continues in Canada's Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough brings the wonders of the Natural History Museum's astonishing collection to life. During a magical, after-hours journey, he brings you closer than ever before to the extraordinary creatures that once roamed our planet.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Lizzie Daly ventures into the Pantanal, where she uses the latest tagging technology to gain insights into the fascinating lives of a group of jaguars.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: An examination of sharks and their habitat.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover how natural selection and human-made pressures are affecting and influencing canid species across the globe, like the raccoon dog, the golden jackal, and the maned wolf.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover the ways in which natural selection and human pressure have shaped the raccoon dog, the golden jackal and the maned wolf.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Lizzie Daly ventures into the Pantanal, where she uses the latest tagging technology to gain insights into the fascinating lives of a group of jaguars.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: An examination of sharks and their habitat.

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
Wild Science
programme.desc: Using CGI, archive footage and science, this series reveals how creatures from deep seas to land predators hunt, survive and dominate nature.

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans Of Reteti

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Julie and Phillip are like ships that pass in the night. Julie works on shifts in an emergency unit, so the couple would like a garden to spend more time in when they are together. They are surrounded by brick walls and would like a wildlife-focused space with £3,000 to spend. The first challenge is to make the budget go as far as possible, and so the team source patio slabs that are identical to what the couple have to give them a bigger social space.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Alisha and Toby are fed up with their sloping garden that has nowhere for them or their pet rabbits to enjoy. Chris and Flo must come up with a design that's both boho-chic and bunny-friendly! Key to the design is one of the biggest pergolas the team have ever built. It's so big, it needs to be anchored to the wall. While Chris manages that and the giant bespoke bench going underneath, Flo is on rabbit duty, creating a play area for the other garden owners.

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Londoners Lily and Natasha have bought a decrepit narrowboat at a knock-down price.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan shows you how to create a garden thats perfect for a party. He reveals how to build an elegant bridge for your guests, how to plant around your seating areas and how to use dramatic garden lighting. Meanwhile Matt James and Valentine Warner join forces to create an alternative to the traditional barbecue, building a firepit and cooking a stuffed leg of lamb.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan comes to the aid of wounded war hero Luke Simpson who lost his leg to an IED on his last tour of duty in Afghanistan, plus Frances Tophill reveals the key design elements for a cottage style garden, Katie Rushworth tells us how to make the most out of cut flowers and David Domoney gives hints and tips on how to maintain the perfect lawn.

programme.title: Great British Food
programme.desc: At the stately home Wimpole Hall, Tom tastes some of the 60 varieties of tomatoes they grow, then creates the perfect golden syrup pudding.

programme.title: Great British Food

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as millionaires, collectors and antique dealers bid for some extraordinary items. Banksy experts take a risk on a piece of wall featuring a work attributed to the anonymous artist. And Tommy Cooper's fez goes on sale.

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: It's the end of the first week, and an argument threatens to send one couple packing...

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh visits a charming seaside garden in East Wittering, Sussex, he shows how to make a nautical obelisk and demonstrates how to adapt your garden to cope with damaging coastal winds, while Laetitia Maklouf sprinkles some seaside chic on a tiny balcony and Charlotte Uhlenbroek shares the secrets of a coastal wildlife garden, plus Alan's tips on how to capture the essence of the sea to create your own mini seaside escape, even if you live in the middle of a city.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan demonstrates how to build a rose garden, and visits one in Wendover, Buckinghamshire. Plus, Laetitia Maklouf reveals ways to extend the life of a rose into winter by making rosewater, Valentine Warner shows how roses can even be the key ingredient in a spicy sauce, and Alan suggests stunning ways to display the flower - from rustic pergolas to pavilions from paradise.

Getting the concrete strip out is the first challenge for the team, but once that's done, the winning plan comes to life. The team add a pergola that incorporates a swing, a barbecue area for Araam.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chloe and Peter are a young couple who have just moved to Godalming in Surrey with their dog. However, their new garden is a neglected, overgrown mess that has a strict tree preservation order on four of the trees. The couple envision a blend of arts and crafts and French formality in their new garden - how will the designers, Charlie and Chris, interpret these very different, almost conflicting ideas in their pitches? With a budget of £6,000.

programme.title: Yorkshire By The Sea

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul fishes at Christchurch's quintessential Bridge Pool in Dorset, hoping to catch sea trout. Bob arrives late but redeems himself by hooking the first fish of the day. The fish is too big for Bob to handle so they head off to a local restaurant to prepare it.

He then joins the UN troops who patrol the line that separates the two sides.

programme.desc: Dave Gorman performs a series of stand-up jokes about the digital footprints people leave behind when surfing the internet.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: A twist on the classic quiz show formula, contestants search through the depths of their knowledge in an attempt to score as few points as possible.

programme.title: Borderforce: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers are on the lookout for day-trippers trying to smuggle prescription pills back into America, bought cheaply from one of the 200 pharmacies on the other side of the border.

programme.title: Borderforce: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Suspicions are raised when a routine x-ray reveals suspicious packages hidden inside the tyres of a pick-up truck. Officers also seize a large shipment of marijuana.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne. There's stuffed rabbit, filled with Parma ham and parmesan frittata for dinner.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein ends his series of Long Weekends in Palermo on the northern coast of Sicily with unforgettable dishes flavoured with pine nuts, raisins, lemons and almonds.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy tests the Chrysler Crossfire and Honda's Type R Civic and NSX, Richard puts a new Smart Car - complete with two engines and two turbos - through its paces, and James casts his eye over the Jaguar XJ6. Carol Vorderman does the honours as the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The race to Monte Carlo is on, with Jeremy in the new Aston Martin DB9, and Richard and James travelling by high speed train. James goes undercover to drive a Rover CityRover and the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car returns with actress Fay Ripley behind the wheel.

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul fishes at Christchurch's quintessential Bridge Pool in Dorset, hoping to catch sea trout. Bob arrives late but redeems himself by hooking the first fish of the day. After a glorious morning Paul persuades Bob to charter a boat out to sea in search of sea bass. Bob has a history of seasickness and is not keen but eventually they venture out to the Needles where Paul makes an incredible catch. The fish is too big for Bob to handle so they head off to a local restaurant to prepare it.

programme.title: Mediterranean With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on the second leg of his four-part journey around the Mediterranean. Setting off from a snowy mountain ski resort in Cyprus, Simon finds an island and a capital city still deeply divided between Turkish Cypriots in the north and Greek Cypriots in the south. He then joins the UN troops who patrol the line that separates the two sides.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Dave and Si reveal that there is so much more to British fowl than roast chicken. They cook up a storm with a duck tikka and one pot partridge recipe before tasting a slice of history from a traditional Yorkshire Christmas Pie packed with delicious birds. The Bikers also recount the history behind the famed Norfolk Black Turkey.

programme.title: Lovejoy

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Tinker is behaving very strangely - he abandons Beth at a bus stop, ruins a deal for Lovejoy when he fails to spot a false leg on an 18th-century piece of furniture, walks out of a pub leaving a pint of beer half drunk, and then disappears entirely leaving no clue as to his whereabouts.

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An eccentric group of ex-police officers are brought out of retirement to investigate unsolved crimes. Lane's future at UCOS is threatened by a death in custody which emerges from his past. Meanwhile, the discovery of a mysterious gun in the Thames re-opens the unsolved 1998 murder of a playboy shipping heir and leads the team to the Rock of Gibraltar.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team unlock over three decades of secrets and lies on the Rock of Gibraltar and find the link which solves the murder of a playboy shipping heir from '98 and a young local boy from '82. programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: The second leg of the journey sees Simon dodge the Moroccan secret police in Western Sahara, travel on one of the world's longest trains in Mauritania, visit a forgotten refugee camp in the Algerian desert where more than 100,000 people live, and take a swim in a Libyan oasis with a government minder who bears an uncanny resemblance to Colonel Gadaffi.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon rejoins the Tropic in Egypt and follows it through Saudi Arabia, Dubai, and Oman. In Southern Egypt, next to the ancient temple of Abu Simbal, Simon meets Nubians struggling to maintain their culture following the damming of the Nile and dives in the pristine reefs of the Red Sea.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his epic journey around the world following the Tropic of Cancer. In India, Simon's journey takes him from the coast of Gujarat in the west to Kolkata in the east. Along the way he spots the shy and beautiful Indian wild ass, learns of the violence between Hindus and Muslims in Gandhi's home city of Ahmedebad and visits the site of one of the world's worst industrial accidents in Bhopal.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: This episode takes Simon through Bangladesh and on a perilous covert journey into Burma, where western journalists are banned. In Bangladesh Simon sails down the mighty Padma River and visits fishermen who use trained otters to drive fish into their nets. From North East India, Simon treks through jungles into Burma to meet the Chin people - an ethnic group who are oppressed by the Burmese government.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: The second leg of the journey sees Simon dodge the Moroccan secret police in Western Sahara, travel on one of the world's longest trains in Mauritania, visit a forgotten refugee camp in the Algerian desert where more than 100,000 people live, and take a swim in a Libyan oasis with a government minder who bears an uncanny resemblance to Colonel Gadaffi.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon rejoins the Tropic in Egypt and follows it through Saudi Arabia, Dubai, and Oman. In Southern Egypt, next to the ancient temple of Abu Simbal, Simon meets Nubians struggling to maintain their culture following the damming of the Nile and dives in the pristine reefs of the Red Sea.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his epic journey around the world following the Tropic of Cancer. In India, Simon's journey takes him from the coast of Gujarat in the west to Kolkata in the east. Along the way he spots the shy and beautiful Indian wild ass, learns of the violence between Hindus and Muslims in Gandhi's home city of Ahmedebad and visits the site of one of the world's worst industrial accidents in Bhopal.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: This episode takes Simon through Bangladesh and on a perilous covert journey into Burma, where western journalists are banned. In Bangladesh Simon sails down the mighty Padma River and visits fishermen who use trained otters to drive fish into their nets. From North East India, Simon treks through jungles into Burma to meet the Chin people - an ethnic group who are oppressed by the Burmese government.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Bored with life on the farm, Marlene throws herself into charity work. As a by-product of her efforts, Boycie senses an opportunity to become Sir Aubrey. Marlene, with the help of their staff, tries to use her charity contacts to help her husband achieve his dream. Unfortunately, life is very rarely that simple, particularly where Boycie and Marlene are concerned.

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin organises a fund-raising dance. Paul innocently lends a helping hand, and in doing so mercilessly interferes with Martin's arrangements. How will Martin retaliate?

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The inmates of Slade Prison are horrified to discover that there is a thief in their midst. Is there no honour among thieves?

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Tyler wants to borrow money to buy new equipment for his band, Puddle of Agony, but Boycie, who was brought up in the school of hard knocks, refuses to cough up. He challenges his son to stand on his own two feet and prove he is a businessman by raising the money himself. This proves difficult, with the local vicinity being gripped by fear of Animal Freedom protestors.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: It looks as if Mr Humphries' career is over when money is missing from the men's counter.

programme.desc: Compo talks about love and ferrets.
